og.title: The Master Box – Original Edition | AmberNord
og.description: 20 × 250 ml of cold-pressed organic sea buckthorn juice. The exclusive original packaging — over 25% savings, free premium shipping.

product.heading: Straight from the source: The ultimate Corporate & Family Edition
product.intro: The Master Box is our exclusive original packaging, designed for serious longevity enthusiasts, large families and visionary companies. Replace the sugary office energy drinks — the ones that briefly spike your team and crash them into fatigue — with genuine cellular energy. Our Tent Selection delivers over 190 bioactive compounds and the rare Omega-7 fatty acid for crystal-clear focus and lasting performance.
product.savingsBody: By choosing the original box you let us bypass unnecessary logistics steps. We pass that efficiency directly on to you: you save over 25% compared with single-bottle purchases and ensure the daily protective ritual never pauses — for you or your team.
included: 20 × 250 ml of the purest, cold-pressed organic essence (Tent Selection).
Yields up to 60 litres of revitalising premium beverage.
The ideal corporate wellness solution for your company.
Free premium shipping directly from our logistics centre in Aarau.

shipping.label: Shipping & Logistics
shipping.text:
Free premium shipping within Switzerland.
Direct dispatch from our logistics centre in Aarau.
